items.content_html: Transform your CapsLock into an AI key! This AutoHotkey app puts powerful AI capabilities right at your fingertips, supercharging your Windows workflow with instant AI assistance for writing, research, translation, and more. Boost your productivity with just a few keystrokes! 🚀🧠⌨️

items.content_html: For Windows/Linux dvorak users! Compiled apps for Windows (ahk-v2), Linux/Win98 (v1.0) & Win-XP (v1.1). There's duplicate (^d), dvorak toggle (^!+d), transparency (#t), AlwaysOnTop (#SPACE), suspend (^!SPACE), TitleBar toggle (F12), grip toggle (^F12), window-lists (F11 & +F11), ControlList (^F11), rename (!r) & explorer (!e).
items.title: TinosNitso/AutoHotkey: For Windows/Linux dvorak users! Compiled apps for Windows (ahk-v2), Linux/Win98 (v1.0) & Win-XP (v1.1).  There's duplicate (^d), dvorak toggle (^!+d), transparency (#t), AlwaysOnTop (#SPACE), suspend (^!SPACE), TitleBar toggle (F12), grip toggle (^F12), window-lists (F11 & +F11), ControlList (^F11), rename (!r) & explorer (!e).

items.content_html: Welcome to my code kitchen! It started as a repo for AutoHotkey-scripts, but grew out into a collection of workflow shortcuts, productivity helpers, quickfixes, personal adaptations of various scripts, autotypers, keyblockers and changers, and a variety of other personal scripts, ideas, concepts and preferences.
